name: nexus-ai
description: NEXUS — A personal AI that lives on your Mac, communicates via Telegram
author: Lucas Topinka

scripts.build: tsup && cp dist/index.cjs ~/.nexus/app/index.cjs && (pnpm run build:web || echo '⚠ web-ui build skipped — run: pnpm --dir web-ui install') && (pnpm run build:wake || echo '⚠ wake-word helper skipped — needs Swift toolchain')
scripts.build:web: pnpm --dir web-ui build && rm -rf "$HOME/.nexus/app/web-ui" && mkdir -p "$HOME/.nexus/app/web-ui" && cp -R web-ui/dist/. "$HOME/.nexus/app/web-ui/"
scripts.build:wake: mkdir -p "$HOME/.nexus/app" && swiftc -O -swift-version 5 macos/nexus-wake/main.swift -o "$HOME/.nexus/app/nexus-wake" -framework Speech -framework AVFoundation -Xlinker -sectcreate -Xlinker __TEXT -Xlinker __info_plist -Xlinker macos/nexus-wake/Info.plist && codesign --force --sign - --identifier com.nexus.wake "$HOME/.nexus/app/nexus-wake"
